common.builtForTeams: Built for teams. Priced for humans.

hero.headline: One platform that replaces every tool your team is {highlight}
hero.subtitle: Stop switching apps. Start shipping work. Lazynext is the operating system for work — tasks, docs, decisions, and AI in one unified graph.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

free.name: Free
free.description: For individuals and small teams getting started.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For growing teams who need more power.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For teams who ship fast and make better decisions.

business.name: Business
business.description: For organizations that need enterprise features.

about.title: About Lazynext
about.mission: We believe teams deserve better tools — ones that track the decisions behind the work, not just the work itself.
about.globalDesc: Built for teams worldwide with transparent pricing, global payments, and design for the 1000+ startups launching every year.

welcome.title: 欢迎来到 Lazynext！
welcome.description: 让我们带您了解平台。这个快速导览将帮助您了解如何在一个地方管理任务、文档、决策和AI。

sidebar.title: 导航侧边栏
sidebar.description: 您的控制中心。访问画布、任务、决策、Pulse仪表板等。

workspace.title: 工作区选择器
workspace.description: 在工作区之间切换或创建新的工作区。

canvas.title: 工作流画布
canvas.description: 拖放节点到无限画布上，构建工作流程。

decisions.title: 决策DNA
decisions.description: 记录每个决策，跟踪质量分数，回顾结果。

tasks.title: 任务视图
tasks.description: 在看板或列表中查看所有任务。

finish.title: 一切就绪！
finish.description: 您已了解基础知识。开始创建您的第一个工作流吧。

guide.title: Welcome to Lazynext
guide.subtitle: Learn how to use every feature of the platform. This guide covers everything from creating workflows to tracking decision quality.
guide.completionDescription: You've learned all the key features. Start building your first workflow or take an interactive tour of the actual workspace.

canvas.title: Workflow Canvas
canvas.description: Your infinite visual workspace for organizing work

dragDrop.title: Drag & Drop Nodes
dragDrop.description: Press N to open the creation menu, then drag Task, Doc, Decision, Thread, Pulse, Automation, or Table nodes onto your canvas. Each node type has its own color and icon.

connect.title: Connect with Edges
connect.description: Draw connections between nodes to show relationships and dependencies. Hover over a node handle and drag to another node to create an edge.

zoom.title: Navigate the Canvas
zoom.description: Scroll to zoom, click and drag the background to pan. Use the minimap in the corner for an overview. On mobile, tap the list view to see all nodes.

nodes.title: 7 Node Types
nodes.description: The building blocks of your workflows

task.title: Task Nodes (Blue)
task.description: Track work items with assignees, due dates, priority, status, and subtasks. Keyboard shortcut: press T on the canvas.

doc.title: Doc Nodes (Green)
doc.description: Create rich documents with a full toolbar — formatting, headings, lists, and code blocks. Keyboard shortcut: press D.

decision.title: Decision Nodes (Orange)
decision.description: Log decisions with question, options, rationale, and outcome. Quality is scored automatically. Keyboard shortcut: press Q.

thread.title: Thread Nodes (Purple)
thread.description: Discuss anything with @mentions, emoji reactions, and comparison tables. Attach threads to any node. Keyboard shortcut: press H.

table.title: Table Nodes (Teal)
table.description: Structured data tables with inline editing, sorting, and summary footers. Perfect for tracking lists and matrices.

decisions.title: Decision DNA
decisions.description: Track and learn from every decision your team makes

log.title: Log Decisions
log.description: Record the question, options considered, your choice, and the rationale behind it. Tag with type (reversible, irreversible, experimental) and category.

quality.title: Quality Scores
quality.description: Every decision gets a quality score based on completeness — did you consider alternatives? Document rationale? Set expected outcomes? Higher scores mean better decision hygiene.

outcomes.title: Outcome Reviews
outcomes.description: After time passes, review how decisions turned out. Mark outcomes as good, bad, or neutral. LazyMind AI learns from patterns and suggests improvements.

lazymind.title: LazyMind AI
lazymind.description: Your AI assistant that understands your workflow

analyze.title: Workflow Analysis
analyze.description: LazyMind reads your canvas and identifies bottlenecks, blocked tasks, and decisions needing attention. Open with ⌘L.

suggest.title: Smart Suggestions
suggest.description: Get AI-powered task prioritization, decision recommendations, and next steps based on your workflow state.

digest.title: Weekly Digests
digest.description: Automatic summaries of what happened — tasks completed, decisions made, threads resolved, and trends to watch.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Work together in real-time across your workspace

realtime.title: Real-Time Cursors
realtime.description: See your teammates' cursors on the canvas in real time. Know who's looking at what, who's typing, and what's being edited.

threads.title: Threaded Discussions
threads.description: Attach conversations to any node. Keep context next to the work. No more hunting through Slack for that one message.

mentions.title: @Mention Anyone
mentions.description: Type @ to mention team members in threads. They'll get a notification and can jump straight to the relevant context.

productivity.title: Productivity Tools
productivity.description: Keyboard shortcuts, command palette, and automations

command.title: Command Palette (⌘K)
command.description: Instantly search anything — nodes, actions, views. Create, navigate, and control the platform without touching the mouse.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Press ? to see all 23 shortcuts. Create nodes (N/T/D/Q/H), toggle panels (⌘L for AI, ⌘K for search), and navigate with speed.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Build WHEN/THEN rules to automate repetitive work. Auto-assign tasks, trigger notifications, update statuses when conditions are met.
